Summary: Project Management
Description: Core project tracking, task management, milestone tracking, and Kanban/list views to replace spreadsheet-based project tracking.

Summary: As a Project Manager, I want to view a centralized dashboard of all active projects so that I can monitor status, deadlines, and team assignments at a glance
Description: Implement a centralized project dashboard displaying all active projects with their current status, assigned team members, deadlines, and completion percentages.

Summary: Build project dashboard REST API with filtering, sorting, and pagination
Implement project dashboard UI with data table, filters, and real-time indicators
Write E2E tests for dashboard filtering, sorting, pagination, and real-time updates
As an Administrator, I want to create, edit, and archive projects with configurable fields so that project records are complete and organized
Description: Enable project CRUD operations with configurable fields including project name, client, start date, deadline, budget, assigned team, and project phases/milestones.

Summary: Build Project domain model and CRUD REST APIs with validation
Implement project creation wizard and edit forms with field validation
Test project CRUD operations, archival, and search for archived projects
As a Team Member, I want to manage tasks within projects with status tracking and dependencies so that I can organize and track my work
Description: Implement task management with creation, assignment, due dates, status tracking, and predecessor/successor dependencies.

Summary: Build Task domain model, status workflow engine, and dependency graph logic
Implement task list view with inline editing, status transitions, and dependency indicators
Test task workflow transitions, dependency validation, and edge cases
As a Project Manager, I want to define milestones with target dates and client approval requirements so that I can track project progress against key deliverables
Description: Implement milestone definition within projects with configurable names, target dates, deliverable associations, and client approval flags.

Summary: Build Milestone service with approval state machine and notification triggers
Implement milestone timeline component and approval UI
Test milestone approval flows, notifications, and edge cases
As a Team Member, I want to use a Kanban board with drag-and-drop to move tasks between status columns so that I can visually manage my workflow
Description: Provide Kanban and list views for task management within each project, allowing team members to drag-and-drop tasks between status columns.

Summary: Build Kanban board API endpoints with real-time status update support via WebSocket
Implement Kanban board UI with drag-and-drop and list view toggle
Test Kanban drag-and-drop across browsers and real-time sync between users
